name: rtemplate
claudeDescription: TEMPLATE: Replace 'example'/'Example'/'EXAMPLE' with your service name throughout this file and throughout the entire plugin directory. This plugin connects Claude Code to the Example MCP server - a Rust-based MCP server built from rmcp-template.
codexDescription: TEMPLATE: Replace with a one-line description of your MCP server for the Codex plugin registry. E.g.: 'Gotify notification server MCP bridge for Codex.'
geminiDescription: TEMPLATE: Replace with a one-line description of your MCP server. E.g.: 'Gotify notification server MCP bridge for Gemini CLI.'

codexInterface.shortDescription: TEMPLATE: Short tagline shown in Codex plugin listings (50 chars max). E.g.: 'Query and manage Example service'.
codexInterface.longDescription: TEMPLATE: Full paragraph describing what this MCP server does, what data it exposes, what operations it supports, and what permissions it needs. This appears on the plugin detail page in Codex.
defaultPrompt: TEMPLATE: Replace with 3 natural-language prompts that demonstrate your server's most useful actions.
